case_title: SERGI SEVERINOV VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-16-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
